global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent logo, headline, and call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to install the CoinBridge app with a focus on savings.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of overlapping circles and rectangles in a light color, creating a modern and abstract background.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized text logo that reads 'CoinBridge', prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: decorative element
elements.description: An abstract shape that adds visual interest, positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: main headline
elements.description: A large, bold text that states 'Save with confidence' in a dark font, with a smaller line below it saying 'No hidden fees'.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence No hidden fees

elements.label: price tag
elements.description: A clear, bold text displaying the price '$4.99' in a prominent position at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Install now' in white font on a dark background, encouraging immediate action.

embedding_texts.global_text: CoinBridge, app promotion, interstitial format, minimalist with bold typography, key elements include logo, headline, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Save with confidence, No hidden fees, CoinBridge, $4.99, Install now
